author: Heidi Swanson
title: Citrus Caesar Salad
ingredients: 1/2 cup Caesar salad dressing, or to your liking
instructions_list: Wash and dry the lettuces and radicchio, tear or cut into bite-sized pieces and place in a large salad bowl.
Add the mint, chives, pistachios, and croutons. Just before serving, drizzle the salad with most of the dressing and toss well. Decide if you want to add more dressing.
Add the avocado and gently toss a couple more times before serving the salad topped with the roasted citrus slices.
description: I’m calling this a Citrus Caesar Salad, it’s basically what happens when a Caesar-style salad dressing bumps up against all the beautiful citrus, lettuces, and avocados at the farmers’ market. Big craggy croutons are a non-negotiable. And toasted nuts and herbs make the whole situation very extra.
